creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Maybe mention that attachments might be not visible with FreeBSD-hosted archives. 

Compare: 

<https://markmail.org/message/6xf44qzwa3seg5da>

* two visible attachments

<https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-current/2022-June/002106.html>

* attachments mentioned, but not visible.
